_comment: Detection-layer eval baseline. `known_gaps` lists case ids whose CURRENT detection output does not match ground truth — the honest, version-controlled 'here is exactly what we currently miss' disclosure. The corpus test asserts the failing set equals this list exactly: a NEW miss fails CI (regression), and a newly-FIXED gap also fails (so the baseline must be updated down, ratcheting recall up). Each gap is a real enforcement-bypass class for the bash file-read gate. The prefix/abs-path/numeric-flag-value classes were closed in the detection-hardening pass; the remaining gaps need a quote-aware tokenizer (grep pattern vs path), multi-path support (multi-file cat), or wrapper-flag parsing (sudo with flags).
